_note: Non-OpenRouter SKUs reachable via mchatai-cloud compute-proxy. Phase IM.3 (2026-05-15). iOS's OpenRouterCatalogService appends these synthetically so the picker can surface audio/image/video generation models. Routing happens at the compute-proxy via per-modality endpoints (/v1/audio/transcriptions, /v1/audio/speech, /v1/images/generations, /v1/videos/generations).

extras.name: OpenAI: Whisper
extras.notes: Speech-to-text. Routed via api.mchatai.com → OpenAI. Whisper-1 is the canonical SKU.

extras.name: OpenAI: Whisper Large v3
extras.notes: Whisper Large v3. Compute-proxy aliases to whisper-1 at runtime.

extras.name: OpenAI: TTS 1
extras.notes: Text-to-speech. Voices: alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer.

extras.name: OpenAI: TTS 1 HD
extras.notes: Higher-quality TTS. 2× the cost of tts-1.

extras.name: OpenAI: GPT-Image 1
extras.notes: Newer OpenAI image-gen. Supports edits + variations.

extras.name: Google: Veo 3 (Preview)

pricing.notes: Approximate; verify against Vertex AI pricing

extras.available_reason: Compute-proxy /v1/videos/generations endpoint shipped; needs Vertex AI service-account key to activate. See mchataiweb/docs/CLOUD_VEO_DEPLOY.md.

extras.name: ElevenLabs: Multilingual v2

pricing.notes: Approximate; ElevenLabs billing is character-credit based

extras.available_reason: Compute-proxy ElevenLabs provider shipped; needs ELEVENLABS_API_KEY in Secret Manager to activate. See mchataiweb/docs/CLOUD_ELEVENLABS_DEPLOY.md.
extras.notes: High-quality multilingual TTS. Route via provider:'elevenlabs' on the speech endpoint.
